art_market.summary: Global art market grew 12% in 2025 with the USA strengthening its dominant position; 2026 sentiment shows cautious optimism among dealers.
key_trends: Global art market reached $59.6 billion in 2025, driven by strong auction results.
U.S. auction market rebounded with 23% growth in 2025, marking the first annual increase since 2022.
Modern and Impressionist art segments led the rebound, while Contemporary art continues a structural repricing.

korean_market.summary: KOSPI closed at 5,781.20 (+0.31%) on March 20, 2026, supported by geopolitical optimism despite foreign selling.
korean_market.sentiment: Cautious optimism; index supported by individual and pension fund buying, geopolitical hopes regarding the conflict in Iran.
